_comment: Copy to config.json. Leave paths empty to auto-detect via PATH. No personal paths are required.
_comment_token_defaults: Leave blank/default for automatic low-context behavior. Set AGENT_BROKER_TOOL_PROFILE=full or mcp_tool_profile=full if an MCP client needs every internal bridge tool.
_comment_contract: compact_task_contract keeps the per-message ground-rules block out of the chat: it writes the full rules once to ~/.agent-broker/AGENT_GROUND_RULES.md and the delivered message only references that path. Set false for the legacy inline rules.
_comment_cdp: CDP model auto-selection is off by default; the debug port is unauthenticated. Opt in only after launching the IDE with --remote-debugging-port.
